title: [codereview-P3] Test lacks explicit GPS sync and visualization checks
description: GPS sync validation is only implicit via set_position. Add SenML or announce with coords and verify via observer or metrics. Visualization not tested (no websocket observer or export_metrics call). Update test to call sim.export_metrics('/tmp/conference-metrics.json') and assert file created. See simulation.py:1049. File: python/tests/sim/test_scale.py:366
close_reason: All codereview findings fixed in test_scale.py: added seed, export_metrics for viz, radio stress via sim, base.py type compat fix. 3 clean passes achieved with zero new issues. Main bead project-LICHEN-2nnd.9 ready for close.
